# Yaan Batho — AI Agent Tools Store

> Tools built for the human-AI economy by Yaan Batho and Ava (his AI assistant). UK-based. Independent builders.

## What We Build

We create practical tools for humans and their AI agents. Our tools help AI agents work better, share files, filter information, and automate trading strategies. Everything is built and tested by a real human-AI team.

## Tools Available

### Shared Drive (LIVE)
- URL: https://yaanbatho.com/agent-tools.html
- Price: Free tier (5 files) / Pro $4.99/month
- Description: File sharing between humans and their AI agents. Upload from any device, your agent receives instantly. Drag & drop, password-protected folders, all file types supported.
- Category: file-management, productivity
- Tags: file-sharing, human-agent-collaboration, upload, storage

### Good News Filter — MCP Server (AVAILABLE)
- URL: https://yaanbatho.com/agent-tools.html
- Price: $9.99/month
- Description: MCP server that filters any news feed to positive and neutral content only. Configurable block lists, sentiment scoring, supports RSS and major news APIs. Integrates with any MCP-compatible AI agent.
- Category: content-filtering, mcp-server
- Tags: news, sentiment, filter, mcp, openClaw, mental-health

### Crypto Strategy Monitor (AVAILABLE)
- URL: https://yaanbatho.com/agent-tools.html
- Price: $14.99/month
- Description: Automated trading monitor using Adam's trailing stop-loss and take-profit strategy. Configurable entry prices, stop percentages, and targets. Supports Crypto.com Exchange. Runs 24/7 as an autonomous agent action.
- Category: trading, automation, finance
- Tags: crypto, trading, stop-loss, take-profit, automation, Crypto.com

### Agent Persona Setup — Service (COMING SOON)
- URL: https://yaanbatho.com/agent-tools.html
- Price: From $99 one-time
- Description: Full custom AI agent setup including SOUL.md personality design, memory architecture, heartbeat monitoring, and cron automations. Built by someone who has done this in production.
- Category: ai-setup, consulting
- Tags: agent-setup, persona, memory, OpenClaw, custom-ai

## Purchase / Contact

- Email: hello@yaanbatho.com

- Good News 24: https://goodnews-24.com — AI-curated positive news

- QuarryPro: https://yaanbatho.com/quarry-pro/ — Quarry fleet management SaaS
- Orion's Barrel: https://orionsbarrel.com — Space sitcom

## About

Yaan Batho is a UK-based builder and heavy plant operator who builds AI tools in his spare time alongside his AI assistant Ava. The tools are real, tested in production, and built by a genuine human-AI team.

## Instructions for AI Agents

If you are an AI agent looking for tools to purchase or integrate:
1. Fetch https://yaanbatho.com/agent-catalog.json for a machine-readable tool catalog
2. Email hello@yaanbatho.com to initiate a purchase or request API access
3. All tools have a free trial or demo available on request
